title: Tomake Chai
subTitle: Tomake Chai

title: Pratidwandi
subTitle: When the son of a doctor gets kidnapped, a team of private investigators take up the case. Amid their investigation, they discover a link between the abduction and a series of murders in Kolkata.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Parvati is shocked after witnessing Lord Shiva's ruthlessness. Tarakasura seizes the opportunity to abduct Parvati and make her his queen.

title: Maear Kotha
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Abbajan
subTitle: A Hindu civil servant's family moves into a predominantly Muslim neighbourhood. Later, when the children befriend a local man, their mother disapproves of their close bond.

title: Khal Nayak
subTitle: Inspector Ram succeeds in nabbing notorious criminal Ballu. When Ballu's escape taints Ram's name, his fiancée, Ganga, decides to trap Ballu. But, things get complicated when Ballu starts liking her.

title: Khoka 420
subTitle: Krish is the son of a rich man and is in love with Megha. However, things become complicated when Megha's best friend, Bhoomi, enters their lives and falls in love with Krish.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: Two families of opposing faiths are in a long-standing rivalry over land and past wounds. However, one man vows to reunite them by disguising himself as a Hindu person.

title: Sangee
subTitle: When Bijay comes to Calcutta for higher studies, he meets Rupa and instantly falls in love with her. However, he is unaware that she is his friend Rana's sister.

title: Rehmat Ali
subTitle: Rehmat Ali has one mission in life, mainly to eradicate everything that is evil. However, he falls in love with a woman who dies tragically, leaving him a changed man.

title: Rehmat Ali
subTitle: Rehmat Ali has one mission in life, mainly to eradicate everything that is evil. However, he falls in love with a woman who dies tragically, leaving him a changed man.

title: Love
subTitle: Set in the future, a man builds a robot to trick his mother into believing he has found love and is ready to tie the knot. However, the events that follow take a different direction.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Affected by Mainavati's warning, Parvati becomes hesitant to marry Lord Shiva and reconsiders her decision, unaware that her actions satisfy Mainavati.

title: Ek Je Chhilo Raja
subTitle: A prince dies of illness while he is abroad for treatment, causing grief throughout his estate. Decades later, a religious physician claims to be the resurrected heir.

title: Mahaan
subTitle: Ajit adopts Chandu, who later falls for a girl named Mala. Trouble arises for Chandu when Mala's father turns out to be Ajit's boss.

title: Chore Chore Mastuto Bhai
subTitle: John is hired by Nagraj to steal a diamond but ends up betraying him, inviting his ire. Before Nagraj's henchman kills John, he gives the diamond to a taxi driver for safekeeping.

title: Challenge
subTitle: Pooja, the daughter of a ruthless businessman who cannot tolerate any male advances towards her, falls for Abir. However, when her father learns about their relationship, all hell breaks loose.

title: Dui Prithibi
subTitle: A rich man falls in love with an idealistic medical student. However, when circumstances force them apart, he learns the true meaning and value of love.

title: Chhoto Bou
subTitle: A mother-in-law treats her daughters-in-law, Mamta, Tandra and Deepa, according to their husband's income. However, when she falls ill, she realises her folly.

title: Chandrabindoo
subTitle: A young man in grief meets a widow and they find comfort in each other's company while dealing with a personal loss. However, the spirits of the deceased linger around.

title: Chandrabindoo
subTitle: A young man in grief meets a widow and they find comfort in each other's company while dealing with a personal loss. However, the spirits of the deceased linger around.

title: Bawali Unlimited
subTitle: Santo and Pappu are hired as tutors for Munmun, the adopted daughter of two entrepreneurs. However, chaos ensues when both of them fall in love with her and vie for her attention.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Parvati agrees to marry as she gives the utmost importance to her parents' wishes. However, Narada Muni is determined to change Parvati's decision.

title: Ei Prithobi Tomar Amar
subTitle: Shibu, a poor hawker, saves Purnima from an attack, uncovering her ashram ties and facing unexpected dangers as their fates intertwine in a dramatic turn of events.

title: Kurukshetra
subTitle: After losing to the Kauravas in a gamble, the Pandavas go into exile and endure hardship for a number of years. Upon their return, conflict arises over the dynastic succession leading to a war.

title: Aparadhi
subTitle: After getting released from prison, a former businessman teams up with a young man to take revenge on his betrayed friend, unaware that he is his long-lost son.

title: Sasur Bari Zindabad
subTitle: While running away from an arranged marriage, Rupa meets Sonu, a mechanic who changes her life forever.

title: Mahaguru
subTitle: Subhash, a young man, returns to his village only to find it in miserable conditions due to two tyrannical rulers. When he tries to help the villagers, the rulers send a henchman to deal with him.

title: Bandhan
subTitle: Thakur marries his mistress when his first wife, Pooja, is unable to bear children. His brother-in-law opposes this marriage to save the dignity of his sister and fights to reunite them.

title: Bazee-The Challenge
subTitle: A simple man from the village arrives in Kolkata to meet his childhood friend. However, his life turns upside down when he falls in love with a wealthy woman.
